title: potentilla sterilis
intro: Potentilla sterilis, also known as the sterile potentilla or five-fingered potentilla, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Consuming Potentilla sterilis has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Potentilla sterilis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
